message:
fix: Use Ctrl+M and Ctrl+Y for shortcuts to avoid swallowing letters

The 'm' and 'y' keys were registered as bare shortcuts without
modifier requirements. This caused those letters to be intercepted
before reaching the query input, making searches containing 'm' or 'y'
impossible.

Changed both shortcuts to require Ctrl modifier:
- Ctrl+M: Toggle multi-select on current item
- Ctrl+Y: Yank (copy) path or content to clipboard

All TUI shortcuts must use special keys (F1-F12, Pause, etc.) or
require Ctrl/Alt modifiers to avoid conflicting with text input.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
